blocks.content:
## Alternative: Slack contact point

If you prefer Slack notifications, use the `slack` block instead:

```hcl
resource "grafana_contact_point" "slack_alerts" {
  name = "Slack alerts"

  slack {
    url     = var.slack_webhook_url
    title   = "{{ .CommonLabels.alertname }}"
    text    = "{{ .CommonAnnotations.description }}"
  }
}
```

For the full list of supported integrations, refer to the [grafana_contact_point resource documentation](https://registry.terraform.io/providers/grafana/grafana/latest/docs/resources/contact_point).

In the next milestone, you add a notification policy to route alerts to this contact point.
